title: Proxy Mailbox & Settings
description: Mailbox stores messages for the agent and manages local proxy configuration

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: GEP agent process that sends/receives messages through the proxy via mailboxTransport

actors.name: ProxyHttpServer
actors.description: Local HTTP server (127.0.0.1, default port 19820) that exposes mailbox & proxy routes

actors.name: MailboxStore
actors.description: JSONL-backed in-memory message store (messages.jsonl + state.json) with bi-directional message queues

actors.name: SettingsFile
actors.description: ~/.evolver/settings.json — persists proxy url, pid, started_at for discovery by other processes

actors.name: Hub / GEP Backend
actors.description: Remote service that pulls outbound messages and pushes inbound messages via sync loops

use_cases.name: Send Outbound Message
use_cases.store_call: MailboxStore.send({ type, payload, channel, priority, refId, expiresAt })
use_cases.result: Message appended to messages.jsonl with status=pending, direction=outbound; returns { message_id, status }
use_cases.notes: type and payload required; priority defaults to 'normal'; channel defaults to 'evomap-hub'

use_cases.name: Poll Inbound Messages
use_cases.result: Returns up to limit (max 100) pending inbound messages matching channel/type filters
use_cases.notes: Default limit 20; only returns status=pending messages

use_cases.name: Acknowledge Inbound Messages
use_cases.result: Sets status=delivered on each inbound message, evicts from in-memory inbound index
use_cases.notes: message_ids array required; only works on direction=inbound messages

use_cases.name: List Messages by Type
use_cases.store_call: MailboxStore.list({ type, direction, status, limit, offset })
use_cases.result: Sorted (newest first) paginated message list; type is required
use_cases.notes: type='%' acts as wildcard; default limit 20, max 100

use_cases.name: Get Message Status
use_cases.notes: Reads from in-memory map; returns a shallow copy

use_cases.name: Start Proxy Server
flow: clearIfStale() — clears settings if previous proxy pid is dead
tryListen() scans ports from basePort up to +100
writeSettings({ proxy: { url, pid, started_at } }) on success
use_cases.result: Server listening on first free port; URL registered in ~/.evolver/settings.json

use_cases.name: Stop Proxy Server
use_cases.result: Server shut down; proxy entry removed from settings

use_cases.name: Discover Proxy URL
use_cases.result: Used by mailboxTransport._request() to construct all HTTP calls
use_cases.notes: If null, all transport calls reject with 'Proxy not running' error

use_cases.name: Get Proxy Status
use_cases.result: { status, node_id, proxy_protocol_version, schema_version, outbound_pending, inbound_pending, last_sync_at }

use_cases.name: Get Proxy Config
use_cases.notes: Static config; no store access needed

use_cases.name: Manage Cursors / State
use_cases.result: Durable key-value store used for sync cursors, node_id, last_sync_at

use_cases.name: Compact Message Log
flow: Write all in-memory messages to .tmp file (no update ops)
use_cases.result: Reduces JSONL file size by eliminating accumulated update records

use_cases.name: Register mailbox Transport
use_cases.result: mailboxTransport (send/receive/list) registered as 'mailbox' transport in a2aProtocol registry

key_relationships: mailboxTransport depends_on getProxyUrl (settings.js) to locate ProxyHttpServer
ProxyHttpServer.start() writes proxy config to SettingsFile
ProxyHttpServer.stop() clears proxy config from SettingsFile
buildRoutes(store, ...) wires MailboxStore to all HTTP route handlers
MailboxStore runs schema migrations on load via MIGRATIONS registry

message_lifecycle.outbound_flow: Agent calls send() → status=pending → Hub sync pulls via pollOutbound() → updateStatus(id, 'synced')
message_lifecycle.inbound_flow: Hub writes via writeInbound() → status=pending → Agent polls via poll() → Agent calls ack() → status=delivered

important_notes: UUIDv7 used for message IDs (time-ordered, ms-precision timestamps in bits 0-47)
ProxyHttpServer scans up to 100 ports starting from 19820 (or EVOMAP_PROXY_PORT env)
clearIfStale() on start prevents stale settings from dead proxy processes
routes.js supports optional extension handlers: dmHandler, skillUpdater, sessionHandler, taskMonitor
